features.name: Bilibili video summary
features.description: Read Bilibili video metadata/subtitles and generate summaries, insights, one-image exports, and Markdown exports.
features.evidence: Existing provider, summary pipeline, one-image pipeline, tests and build passing in recent sessions.

features.name: YouTube watch/shorts support
features.description: Support YouTube watch and shorts pages with provider registry, metadata extraction, page subtitles, youtubei fallback, translated tracks, and official API fallback configuration.
features.evidence: Implemented in src/sources/youtube and covered by test/core.test.ts YouTube source parsing tests.

features.name: Language-aware summaries
features.description: Support UI language and subtitle/summary language settings, with English prompt variants and subtitle preference handling.
features.evidence: Settings, prompt templates, transcript selection, and tests updated.

features.name: One-image export
features.description: Generate structured one-image JSON, optional image prompt/background, render DOM card, and export PNG.
features.evidence: Existing onePage pipeline, templates, html-to-image export, and regression tests.

features.name: Summary streaming UX fixes
features.description: Preserve manual scroll during streaming re-renders, collapse reasoning after completion, and keep the summary output frame full height in empty/short states.
features.evidence: Covered by summary thinking and scroll preservation tests in test/core.test.ts.

features.name: ASR fallback for no-subtitle videos
features.description: Add an ASR path for videos where YouTube/Bilibili expose no usable subtitle tracks.
features.evidence: ASR_INTEGRATION_RESEARCH.md documents low-cost options; implementation not started.

features.name: Bilibili subtitle WBI resilience
features.description: Reduce risk from unsigned Bilibili x/player/wbi/v2 subtitle requests by adding fallback or WBI signing.

features.name: Harness files
features.description: Add agent instructions, feature tracking, progress log, startup verification script, and handoff template.
features.evidence: Created by harness-creator session; init.sh syntax and feature_list.json parsing verified on 2026-05-19.

features.name: Fullscreen panel visibility
features.description: Hide the launcher and expanded panel during Bilibili or YouTube browser fullscreen playback, then restore on exit.
features.evidence: Panel listens for standard and WebKit fullscreen changes; fullscreen detection is covered by test/core.test.ts.
